title: taraxacum angustisquameum
intro: Taraxacum angustisquameum, commonly known as the narrow-leaved dandelion or Chinese dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum angustisquameum include reducing blood pressure, alleviating liver and kidney issues, and potentially aiding in cancer prevention. Taraxacum angustisquameum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be consumed raw or as a supplement in capsule form.
